headline: Release 001 delivers a dramatically faster dashboard, a streamlined two-step signup, and clearer API onboarding docs.

themes.user_facing_summary: The dashboard now loads up to 67% faster, and workspace member listings are significantly snappier for teams of 50 or more. Org settings also benefit from a new caching layer that reduces load times under typical workspace traffic.
supporting_changes: PERF-411: Reduce dashboard p95 latency from 2.4s to 800ms via DB call batching
PERF-415: Add Redis caching layer to org-settings API
PERF-422: Eliminate N+1 query in workspace member listing endpoint

themes.user_facing_summary: New users now complete signup in two steps instead of five, with optional profile details deferred until after signup. The first-run dashboard surfaces four contextual tips on your most-used metrics right when you need them.
supporting_changes: ONBOARD-201: Replace 5-step signup with email-first 2-step flow
ONBOARD-205: Add inline tooltips on first-run dashboard for top 4 metrics
ONBOARD-208: Defer non-essential profile fields to post-signup

themes.user_facing_summary: The API quickstart now reflects the latest auth model, removing a common friction point for developers integrating for the first time.
supporting_changes: DOCS-88: Update API quickstart to reflect new auth model

notable_changes: Dashboard 95th-percentile load time cut from 2.4s to 800ms (67% faster)
Workspace member listing is ~30% faster for teams with 50 or more members
Signup flow reduced from five steps to two — new users reach the product faster
First-run dashboard now shows contextual tooltips on the four metrics new users care about most
API quickstart updated to match the current auth model
customer_voice: Customers flagged a sluggish dashboard as the top pain point in the Q2 NPS survey and new-user signups were being abandoned mid-flow; this release directly addresses both while also delivering the inline first-run guidance and clearer auth docs that customers and the CS team had been asking for.
